message:
chore(workspace): migrate to Rust edition 2024 and update dependencies

Upgrade the entire workspace from Rust edition 2021 to 2024 and unpin the
nightly toolchain (was pinned to nightly-2026-02-05 to work around a serde_derive
type inference regression; no longer needed on current nightly).

Dependency version bumps:
- smallvec 1.13 → 1.15
- tempfile 3.17 → 3.25 (both [dependencies] and [dev-dependencies])
- proptest 1.6 → 1.10
- rayon 1.10 → 1.11
- rustls-pki-types 1.12 → 1.14
- bincode 1.3 → bincode-next 2.1 (maintained fork with serde interop;
  the original bincode 1.x was flagged as unmaintained in RustSec-2025-0141)

New clippy allow:
- `collapsible_if = "allow"` — suppresses Rust 2024 let-chain refactoring
  suggestions that would require broad style-only rewrites; deferred to a
  future focused cleanup pass.

All sub-crate Cargo.toml files (asupersync-macros, conformance,
franken_decision, franken_evidence, franken_kernel, frankenlab, fuzz)
also bumped to edition = "2024".

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ exclude = ["fuzz"]
 [package]
 name = "asupersync"
 version = "0.2.3"
-edition = "2021"
+edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Spec-first, cancel-correct, capability-secure async runtime for Rust."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"
@@ -98,7 +98,7 @@ crossbeam-queue = "0.3"
 parking_lot = "0.12"
 polling = "3.11"
 slab = "0.4"
-smallvec = "1.13"
+smallvec = "1.15"
 pin-project = "1.1"
 rmp-serde = "1.3"
 serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
@@ -107,9 +107,8 @@ socket2 = { version = "0.6", features = ["all"] }
 libc = "0.2"
 nix = { version = "0.31", features = ["fs", "poll", "socket", "uio", "user"] }
 getrandom = "0.4"
-# NOTE: bincode 1.3.3 is marked unmaintained (RustSec-2025-0141) but stable.
-# Consider migration to postcard in future. See UPGRADE_LOG.md for details.
-bincode = "1.3"
+# Use maintained bincode-next (crate imported as `bincode`) with serde interop.
+bincode = { package = "bincode-next", version = "2.1", features = ["serde"] }
 # Optional tracing integration - only compiled when tracing-integration feature is enabled
 tracing = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
 # Optional tracing subscriber for test-internals feature
@@ -132,10 +131,10 @@ lz4_flex = { version = "0.12", optional = true }
 # Optional visibility macro for test-internals feature
 visibility = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
 # Tempfile helper for test-internals and test logging utilities.
-tempfile = "3.17"
+tempfile = "3.25"
 # TLS support via rustls
 rustls = { version = "0.23", default-features = false, features = ["std", "tls12"], optional = true }
-rustls-pki-types = { version = "1.12", optional = true }
+rustls-pki-types = { version = "1.14", optional = true }
 # Optional native root certificates
 rustls-native-certs = { version = "0.8", optional = true }
 # Optional webpki root certificates
@@ -179,19 +178,19 @@ io-uring = { version = "0.7.11", optional = true }
 ring = { version = "0.17", optional = true }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-proptest = "1.6"
+proptest = "1.10"
 criterion = { version = "0.8", features = ["html_reports"] }
 futures-lite = "2.6"
 conformance = { package = "asupersync-conformance", version = "0.2.0", path = "conformance" }
-tempfile = "3.17"
+tempfile = "3.25"
 tracing = "0.1"
 tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter"] }
 opentelemetry_sdk = { version = "0.31", default-features = false, features = ["metrics", "testing"] }
 lz4_flex = "0.12"
 toml = "1.0"
 # Certificate generation for TLS/QUIC tests
 rcgen = "0.14"
-rayon = "1.10"
+rayon = "1.11"
 serde_yaml = "0.9"
 
 [[bench]]
@@ -286,3 +285,5 @@ doc_markdown = "allow"
 cast_possible_truncation = "allow"
 # Many Duration::from_millis(1000) patterns are intentionally explicit about units
 duration_suboptimal_units = "allow"
+# Rust 2024 migration: postpone broad style-only rewrites from let-chain opportunities.
+collapsible_if = "allow"

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 [package]
 name = "asupersync-macros"
 version = "0.2.0"
-edition = "2021"
+edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Proc macros for asupersync structured concurrency runtime"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 [package]
 name = "asupersync-conformance"
 version = "0.2.0"
-edition = "2021"
+edition = "2024"
 description = "Conformance test suite for async runtime specifications"
 license = "MIT"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 [package]
 name = "franken-decision"
 version = "0.2.0"
-edition = "2021"
+edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Decision Contract schema and runtime for FrankenSuite."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"
@@ -14,8 +14,8 @@ serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 serde_json = "1.0"
-toml = "0.8"
-proptest = "1.6"
+toml = "1.0"
+proptest = "1.10"
 
 [lints.rust]
 unsafe_code = "deny"

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 [package]
 name = "franken-evidence"
 version = "0.2.0"
-edition = "2021"
+edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Canonical EvidenceLedger schema for FrankenSuite decision tracing."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"
@@ -12,8 +12,8 @@ serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-proptest = "1.6"
-tempfile = "3.17"
+proptest = "1.10"
+tempfile = "3.25"
 
 [lints.rust]
 unsafe_code = "deny"

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 [package]
 name = "franken-kernel"
 version = "0.2.0"
-edition = "2021"
+edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Suite-wide type substrate for FrankenSuite: TraceId, DecisionId, PolicyId, SchemaVersion."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 serde_json = "1.0"
-proptest = "1.6"
+proptest = "1.10"
 
 [lints.rust]
 unsafe_code = "deny"

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankenlab"
 version = "0.2.0"
-edition = "2021"
+edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Deterministic testing harness for async Rust: record, replay, and minimize concurrency bugs."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ name = "frankenlab"
 path = "src/main.rs"
 
 [dependencies]
-asupersync = { version = "0.2.0", path = "..", features = ["cli", "test-internals"] }
+asupersync = { version = "0.2.3", path = "..", features = ["cli", "test-internals"] }
 clap = { version = "4", features = ["derive"] }
 serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0"

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ name = "asupersync-fuzz"
 version = "0.0.0"
 authors = ["Automated"]
 publish = false
-edition = "2021"
+edition = "2024"
 
 [package.metadata]
 cargo-fuzz = true
